label: AC-4(14)
title: Security or Privacy Policy Filter Constraints

prose.en: When transferring information between different security domains, implement {param:ac-4.14_prm_1} requiring fully enumerated formats that restrict data structure and content.

parameters.name: ac-4.14_prm_1
parameters.label: organization-defined security or privacy policy filters

guidance.en: Data structure and content restrictions reduce the range of potential malicious or unsanctioned content in cross-domain transactions. Security or privacy policy filters that restrict data structures include restricting file sizes and field lengths. Data content policy filters include encoding formats for character sets, restricting character data fields to only contain alpha-numeric characters, prohibiting special characters, and validating schema structures.

prose.en: when transferring information between different security domains, implemented {param:ac-04.14_odp.01} require fully enumerated formats that restrict data structure and content;
when transferring information between different security domains, implemented {param:ac-04.14_odp.02} require fully enumerated formats that restrict data structure and content.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
list of security and privacy policy filters
list of data structure policy filters
list of data content policy filters
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
Mechanisms implementing information flow enforcement policy

guidelines.en: security policy filters to be implemented that require fully enumerated formats restricting data structure and content have been defined;
privacy policy filters to be implemented that require fully enumerated formats restricting data structure and content are defined;
